retry_reason: Put operations are unconditional and always succeed; retrying would cause a double-put and potential use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a deferred put wrapper used as a workqueue handler. It extracts the aio_kiocb from the embedded work_struct and releases one reference by calling iocb_put. The caller must not use the aio_kiocb after queuing this work, as the object may be freed asynchronously. This wrapper does not transfer ownership; it merely schedules the release of an existing reference.
